test_cases.input_summary: Research plan for a university vice-chancellor facing allegations of misuse of research funds, for an investigative news story
test_cases.notes: Source checklist was comprehensive and well-prioritised for the investigative angle. Key questions were specific to the academic/financial context. Verification priorities correctly targeted credential and funding claims.

test_cases.input_summary: Interview preparation brief for a tech startup CEO appearing on a podcast about AI ethics, general profile angle
test_cases.notes: Strong adaptation to the tech/startup context. Patent and IP searches were well-integrated. Interview angles were thoughtful. Slightly over-broad on the source checklist for the stated purpose.

test_cases.input_summary: Background research on a retired military officer now advising a defence contractor, for a conflict-of-interest investigation
test_cases.notes: Excellent revolving-door angle coverage. Military records and procurement databases were correctly identified. Verification priorities were sharply focused on the conflict-of-interest question. Slightly dense — could be more scannable.
